name: Mystical Bad Juju
description: Mystical Bad Juju is the Mystical counterpart of Bad Juju in Skylanders: Imaginators. The figure was exclusively sold at GameStop stores and features a distinct black, white, and gold color scheme.
biography: Just like her name suggests, Bad Juju had always been bad. From her humble beginnings as a witch doctor, where she put curses on her patients instead of curing them, to being the Golden Queen's right-hand sorceress, she had spent her entire life as a villain. Being captured by the Skylanders didn't do much to change her attitude either. At least, that was the case until the day she conjured up more than she bargained for – a son named Juju Junior. That was when she finally decided it was time to change her lifestyle. She didn't want to raise Juju Junior inside a prison thinking that his magical mother was a criminal. So she asked Master Eon to give her a chance to be a hero instead. As luck would have it, Eon was looking for a Swashbuckler Sensei who could help train Imaginators the value of being good. Not bad for Bad Juju.
personality: Mystical Bad Juju is a reformed villain whose primary motivation is her son, Juju Junior. She is determined, protective, and seeks to prove that even those with a dark past can become heroes through devotion and change.

story.content: Desiring a better life for her son, Juju Junior, Bad Juju left her life of crime behind to join the Skylanders as a Sensei, proving her redemption through the Mystical arts.

trivia: Though her blades are red in the figure and official artwork, they have their original cyan color in the game.
Possibly because they share the same palette and outfit, Juju Junior has the same color changes as his mother.
She and Mystical Tae Kwon Crow are the only Mystical counterparts of the franchise.
A villainous variant appears as an Undead enemy in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.
gameplay: As a Swashbuckler Sensei, Mystical Bad Juju utilizes rapid-fire blade strikes and air-based magic. She can summon Juju Junior to the field to create whirlwinds and knock back enemies, providing a mix of melee and area-of-effect damage.

basic.name: Whirling Blades
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to slash with your blades. Continue pressing for a combo.

basic.name: Juju Junior
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to summon Juju Junior to create a small whirlwind.

basic_upgrades.name: Windy Wail
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge a more powerful whirlwind attack.

basic_upgrades.name: Static Shock
basic_upgrades.content: Blade attacks now deal additional lightning damage to nearby enemies.

soulgems.name: Child Protection
soulgems.content: Juju Junior will automatically counterattack any enemy that strikes Bad Juju.

abilities.name: Junior's Justice
abilities.content: Juju Junior's whirlwind and attacks deal significantly more damage.
